prompt_used: Story: Black Chapel Ledger (black-chapel-ledger) | Hook: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money. | Subgenre: gothic horror | Tone: EERIE | Location: Cliffside cathedral archive district | Villain: The Creditor | Villain worldview: Every truth must be paid for, and mercy is fraud. | Motifs: ink-stained fingers, funeral bells, salt wax. Compose ending score cue for "Clean Resolution" that supports summary "You expose the debt network and return stolen identities to survivors." and epilogue "Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.".
